is a professional [ice hockey](/wiki/Ice_hockey "Ice hockey") team based in [Garmisch-Partenkirchen](/wiki/Garmisch-Partenkirchen "Garmisch-Partenkirchen"), [Oberbayern](/wiki/Oberbayern "Oberbayern"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). They currently play in the [Oberliga](/wiki/Oberliga_(ice_hockey) "Oberliga (ice hockey)"),[[1]](#cite_note-1) the third level of ice hockey in Germany. Prior to the 2013–14 season, they played in the [2nd Bundesliga](/wiki/2nd_Bundesliga_(ice_hockey) "2nd Bundesliga (ice hockey)"). They play their home games at the *Olympia-Eissport-Zentrum*.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Ice hockey team in Garmisch-Partenkirchen, Oberbayern

| SC Riessersee | |
| --- | --- |
| City | [Garmisch-Partenkirchen](/wiki/Garmisch-Partenkirchen "Garmisch-Partenkirchen"), [Oberbayern](/wiki/Oberbayern "Oberbayern") |
| League | [Oberliga (ice hockey)](/wiki/Oberliga_(ice_hockey) "Oberliga (ice hockey)") |
| Founded | 1923 (1923) |
| Home arena | [Olympia-Eissport-Zentrum](/wiki/Olympia-Eissport-Zentrum "Olympia-Eissport-Zentrum") (capacity: 6,929) |
| Colours | Blue, white |
| Head coach | [Pat Cortina](/wiki/Pat_Cortina "Pat Cortina") |
| Captain | Florian Vollmer |
| Website | [www.scriessersee.de](http://www.scriessersee.de) [www.scr.de](http://www.scr.de) |

**SC Riessersee** is a professional [ice hockey](/wiki/Ice_hockey "Ice hockey") team based in [Garmisch-Partenkirchen](/wiki/Garmisch-Partenkirchen "Garmisch-Partenkirchen"), [Oberbayern](/wiki/Oberbayern "Oberbayern"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). They currently play in the [Oberliga](/wiki/Oberliga_(ice_hockey) "Oberliga (ice hockey)"),[[1]](#cite_note-1) the third level of ice hockey in Germany. Prior to the 2013–14 season, they played in the [2nd Bundesliga](/wiki/2nd_Bundesliga_(ice_hockey) "2nd Bundesliga (ice hockey)"). They play their home games at the *Olympia-Eissport-Zentrum*.

The club is the most historic club in the German professional league, with the most German championships.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

Famous players who played in the club are the current president of the German Icehockey Federation Franz Reindl and Ignaz Berndaner, both local players and national players and Olympic medallists in the 1976 Olympic games at Innsbruck.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

The SC Riessersee has played in its history 26 championship finals, being considered today a cult club in German sports.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

## Achievements

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SC_Riessersee&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Achievements")]

* [German championship](/wiki/German_champions_(ice_hockey) "German champions (ice hockey)"):
  + Winners (10): 1927, 1935, 1938, 1941, 1947, 1948, 1950, 1960, 1978, 1981
  + Finalist (16): 1925, 1928, 1929, 1932, 1933, 1934, 1936, 1937, 1942, 1943, 1952, 1953, 1956, 1957, 1958, 1979
* German Oberliga Champion:
  + Winners (1): 2011
* [Basler Cup](/wiki/Basler_Cup "Basler Cup") champion (3): 1954, 1955, 1956

## Famous players and coaches

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SC_Riessersee&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Famous players and coaches")]

* See also: [Category:SC Riessersee players](/wiki/Category:SC_Riessersee_players "Category:SC Riessersee players")

In the Hall of Fame of the German Ice Hockey Museum are persons who have made a special contribution to the ice hockey sport in Germany. So far 19 players and coaches from the club have been admitted to the Hall of Fame.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

[Bibi Torriani](/wiki/Bibi_Torriani "Bibi Torriani") coached SC Riessersee during the [1957–58 season](/wiki/1957%E2%80%9358_Oberliga_(ice_hockey)_season "1957–58 Oberliga (ice hockey) season"), and was later inducted into the [IIHF Hall of Fame](/wiki/IIHF_Hall_of_Fame "IIHF Hall of Fame") as a player.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## NHL Players at the SC Riessersee

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=SC_Riessersee&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: NHL Players at the SC Riessersee")]

At the beginning of October 2012 during the [2012–13 NHL lockout](/wiki/2012%E2%80%9313_NHL_lockout "2012–13 NHL lockout") in the [National Hockey League](/wiki/National_Hockey_League "National Hockey League"), forward [Matt D'Agostini](/wiki/Matt_D%27Agostini "Matt D'Agostini") of the [St. Louis Blues](/wiki/St._Louis_Blues "St. Louis Blues") and [Rick DiPietro](/wiki/Rick_DiPietro "Rick DiPietro") of the [New York Islanders](/wiki/New_York_Islanders "New York Islanders") played at the SC Riessersee. In November 2012, [Ottawa Senators](/wiki/Ottawa_Senators "Ottawa Senators") forward, [Erik Condra](/wiki/Erik_Condra "Erik Condra"), also joined the team.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

Current [Chicago Blackhawks](/wiki/Chicago_Blackhawks "Chicago Blackhawks") forward and olympic silver medallist [Dominik Kahun](/wiki/Dominik_Kahun "Dominik Kahun") played for SC Riessersee in September and October 2014 in the beginning of his career.[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]
